overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, showcasing towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and neon signage. The camera glides smoothly above the rooftops of Night City, revealing dense urban architecture with steam vents and vibrant billboards under a clear blue sky.

large floating holographic advertisements between buildings

segments.scene_description: The drone begins its flight over the cyberpunk cityscape, with the massive COLA advertisement tower visible in the distance. The BIG BIG building dominates the left foreground while steam vents billow white smoke into the clear sky. Holographic displays and futuristic skyscrapers fill the background, establishing the dense urban environment.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward, bringing the COLA tower closer into view at the center of the frame. The architecture reveals intricate rooftop details including ventilation systems and neon signage. The BIG BIG building remains visible on the left as the drone maintains its steady altitude above the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing central tower revealing deeper urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The drone passes the COLA tower, which shifts to the right side of the frame before exiting view. Deeper city architecture and bridge structures become visible in the background as the camera reveals more of the urban canyon. The flight continues smoothly over the dense rooftop landscape, showcasing the expansive cyberpunk metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a dense cyberpunk cityscape that shifts from a focus on towering foreground structures to an expansive view of the urban canyon. It begins with the drone flying past the massive BIG BIG building on the left, while white smoke from steam vents billows into a clear sky toward a distant COLA advertisement tower. As the camera pushes forward, the COLA tower moves to the center of the frame, revealing intricate rooftop ventilation systems and vibrant neon signage beneath the drone's steady altitude. The scene then opens further as the camera passes the tower, which shifts to the right and exits the view to uncover deeper city architecture and bridge structures in the background. Finally, the flight continues smoothly over the rooftop landscape, revealing the full scale of the expansive metropolis.
